source_text:
Team update:

Good news: We hit 10,000 users last week! 🎉
Bad news: The server crashed twice on Tuesday.
FYI: The new office opens next month on the 15th floor.
Action needed: Someone needs to investigate the server crashes and implement auto-scaling.
Reminder: All expense reports are due by end of month.
Note: The client liked the demo but wants changes to the reporting feature.
Action: Prepare a revised demo incorporating client feedback by next Friday.
Fun fact: Our competitor just raised $50M.
